name: com.likeon.nativerelay
description: Thread-safe relay for native async callbacks in Unity, dispatched on the main thread, one request <-> one result. Low-allocation seed + pending-table + double-buffer-queue bridge between native worker-thread callbacks and your C# business layer.

samples.description: Fire concurrent requests through a pure-C# MockChannel and watch them dispatched on the main thread, one seed <-> one result.
MockChannel simulates speech->text results driving a fake dialogue UI (no real ASR engine, no key, no device).
